message:
🐛 Fix audio regression: remove af filter and aac_at exclusion (#17)

- af=lavfi=[...] filter was breaking audio on all streams
- Removing -aac_at exclusion since AAC AudioToolbox works fine
- Only exclude -ac3_at,-eac3_at for surround stream fix
- Removed forced ao=coreaudio and verbose logging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
